github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Generate a commit message with header from: Feature, Refactor, Fix, Test, Todo. Each header represents a section. Meaning of each header goes like this: Feature → new functionality, Refactor → code restructuring, Fix → bug fixes, Test → testing-related changes, Todo → tasks to be done. Each file should be analyzed separately and understood in order to find out the changes. Multiple sections can be used based on staged changes. Format: Header followed by ':' and newline bullet points. Each bullet must start with '-' and use past tense verbs like Added, Updated, Removed, Refactored, Implemented. Keep it concise and well grouped. Do NOT use conventional commit format.
